_note: Overlaps with digital_identity.github_personal_access_token. The credentials/ version is canonical for secret detection; digital_identity/ version retained for category-based policy inclusion.
name: GitHub Personal Access Token
summary: Detects GitHub PATs in classic (ghp_) and fine-grained (github_pat_) formats
description: Detects GitHub Personal Access Tokens. Format: ghp_ (classic), github_pat_ (fine-grained). Can access repositories, create commits, modify issues.

metadata.risk: Repository access, code modification, data theft

effect.message: GitHub Personal Access Token redacted - must never be exposed
